name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafers and margarine; press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a 1-1/2 quart heavy saucepan, melt caramels with milk over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour mixture over the crust.
3. Top with pecans.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla; beat at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Blend in chocolate pieces.
7. Pour over the pecans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill. Garnish with whipped cream, additional chopped nuts, and maraschino cherries if desired.
